steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The student wants to explain what a sky island is. The correct sentence must define the concept, not just describe the specific mountains.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — : describes the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains without defining 'sky island.' ✗
  • Choice B — : defines a sky island as an isolated mountain range whose environment differs drastically from the surrounding lowlands, then uses the Peloncillo-Pan Duro Mountains as an example. ✓
  • Choice C — : mentions the term 'sky island' but does not explain what it means. ✗
  • Choice D — : focuses on the surrounding lowlands rather than defining the concept. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
